resultRaw.sql:
SELECT s.current_semester AS semester, COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM public.students AS s
GROUP BY s.current_semester
ORDER BY s.current_semester ASC;

result.sql:

FROM public.students AS s

ORDER BY s.current_semester ASC;
